Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Production In Response To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Igor Kopilenko, Esq. of Allegiance Law, Tel. 415.404.6395, for plaintiff and moving party;
Sally Noma, Esq. of the Law Offices of Mark T. Lobre, Tel. 415.281.7112, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, PLAINTIFF YICHEL CHAN'S Motion To Compel Production In Response To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
